name: Seonji Kim
about: I am a **Ph.D. student** in the **Graduate School of Culture Technology at KAIST** and a member of the **Ubiquitous Virtual Reality Lab**, advised by **Prof. Woontack Woo**. I believe **physical space can become a new medium for AR/VR/MR**, and my work explores how **spatial computing** can shape interaction, perception, and experience across heterogeneous physical environments.
